response.justification: While the candidate possesses exceptional technical expertise that perfectly aligns with the required stack (TypeScript, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and AI), they have over 15 years of experience and currently hold Staff Engineer/Founder roles. This makes them vastly overqualified for an entry-level or junior position, creating a high risk of salary mismatch, lack of role satisfaction, and rapid turnover.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, React, and Node.js.
Strong nice-to-have qualifications including AWS, Kubernetes, and AI/LLM agent infrastructure.
Proven dedication to software craftsmanship, clean architecture, and TDD.
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level/junior role with 15+ years of experience.
Highly likely to have salary expectations far exceeding a junior/mid-level budget.
Potential flight risk or dissatisfaction with the limited scope of an entry-level individual contributor role.
